title: Collectorate Rayagada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Launch Driver & Khalasi Posts
short_info: Collectorate Rayagada has released the official Launch Driver & Khalasi Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 513 /VI-01/2026 at Rayagada District Official Website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the Collectorate Rayagada Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates possessing a 2nd Class Launch Driving Certificate from Director of Ports and Inland Water Transport, Odisha and Crew Training completion certificate can apply offline up to 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 2nd class Launch Driving Certificate from Director of Ports and Inland Water Transport, Odisha, Crew Training completion certificate from Crew Training Institute
qualification.details: Launch Driver: Minimum 2nd class Launch Driving Certificate issued by proper authority. Khalasi: Crew Training completion certificate from Crew Training Institute.

selection_process: Technical Test Swimming Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Collectorate Rayagada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: rayagada.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
